text.title: SOC2 Control-to-Repo Artifact Map Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying soc2-control-to-repo-artifact-map must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: last_verified older than 90 days for a Type II control.
Evidence retention <12 months for any Type II control.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
